2603.28554.title: Hydra: Unifying Document Retrieval and Generation in a Single Vision-Language Model
2603.28554.paper_summary: Visual document understanding typically requires separate retrieval and generation models, doubling memory and system complexity. We present Hydra, a dual-head approach that provides both ColBERT-style late-interaction retrieval and autoregressive generation from a single vision-language model (VLM). A single LoRA adapter, trained only for retrieval, is toggled at inference: enabling it produces multi-vector embeddings; disabling it recovers the base model's generation quality -- byte-identical outputs in 100% of 10,500 greedy and stochastic samples, with max delta-ANLS = 0.0044 across 15,301 samples on four VQA benchmarks (three informative; ChartQA is near-zero for both models under greedy decoding) when compared against an independent base-model pipeline. We identify three engineering requirements (attention-mode restoration, lm_head preservation, KV-cache-aware decoding) whose omission silently breaks generation despite correct weight recovery. On ViDoRe V1, Hydra (4B) is within 1 percentage point of a controlled single-head baseline in a single training run, with higher aggregate scores on V2 and V3 that are concentrated on a subset of tasks; multi-seed experiments are needed to confirm these trends. The single-model design reduces peak GPU memory by 41%, though adapter switching introduces throughput overhead under concurrent serving loads. An ablation shows that GritLM-style joint training provides no benefit within the LoRA-based (r=16) training regime. A proof-of-concept extension to Qwen2.5-Omni-3B demonstrates that the mechanism generalizes to audio retrieval and video embedding, with speech generation.
2603.28554.paper_summary_zh: 視覺文件理解通常需要獨立的檢索和生成模型，這使得記憶體和系統複雜度加倍。<lb/>我們提出了Hydra，一種雙頭方法，提供ColBERT風格的後期交互檢索和自回歸生成，均來自單一的視覺-語言模型（VLM）。<lb/>在推理時切換單個僅為檢索訓練的LoRA適配器：啟用它會產生多向量嵌入；禁用它則恢復基礎模型的生成質量——在10,500個貪婪和隨機樣本中，100% 的字節相同輸出，並且在四個VQA基準（其中三個為信息性；在貪婪解碼下，ChartQA對兩個模型的結果接近零）上，最大delta-ANLS為0.0044，與獨立的基礎模型管道相比。<lb/>我們確定了三個工程需求（注意力模式恢復、lm_head保留、KV-cache感知解碼），其省略會在正確的權重恢復下默默破壞生成。<lb/>在ViDoRe V1上，Hydra（4B）在單次訓練運行中與受控的單頭基線相差不到1個百分點，在V2和V3上則有更高的總體分數，這些分數集中在一部分任務上；需要多種種子實驗來確認這些趨勢。<lb/>單模型設計將峰值GPU記憶體減少了41%，儘管適配器切換在同時服務負載下引入了吞吐量開銷。<lb/>一項消融實驗顯示，在基於LoRA的（r=16）訓練體系中，GritLM風格的聯合訓練並未帶來任何好處。<lb/>對Qwen2.5-Omni-3B的概念驗證擴展顯示該機制可以推廣到音頻檢索和視頻嵌入，並實現語音生成。
2603.28554.author: Athos Georgiou et.al.
